summary: Trade Ticker Strip Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 13/13 tests (100%). Frontend: 8/8 UI tests (100%). New Trade Ticker strip verified globally across all pages with correct empty state.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/ticker/feed returns empty array when no executions exist
GET /api/ticker/feed item structure validation (id, strategy, asset, side, size, price, edge_bps, timestamp)
frontend_ui_tests: Trade Ticker appears globally with data-testid='trade-ticker' on Overview page
Trade Ticker shows 'Waiting for executions...' text when no trades (empty state)
Trade Ticker appears on /arbitrage page (global component in AppShell)
Trade Ticker appears on /sniper page (global component in AppShell)
Trade Ticker appears on /positions page (global component in AppShell)
WebSocket shows 'Live' status indicating single active connection
Trade Ticker persists after multiple page navigations
regression_tests: P&L Chart section present with data-testid='section-pnl-chart'
All 7 nav items present in sidebar (Overview, Arbitrage, Sniper, Positions, Risk, Markets, Settings)

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing engine state with no executions (empty feed state)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Ticker strip (Phase 7) complete. TradeTicker component at /app/frontend/src/components/TradeTicker.jsx mounted in AppShell between TopBar and main content. Two render modes: (1) Empty state shows 'TAPE' label + 'Waiting for executions...' (2) With data shows scrolling ticker items with format [STRATEGY] [ASSET] [SIDE] [SIZE] @ [PRICE] EDGE [bps]. API endpoint GET /api/ticker/feed combines arb_scanner and crypto_sniper executions. AppShell watches stats.total_trades from WebSocket and re-fetches ticker when it changes. CSS animation @keyframes ticker-scroll handles horizontal scrolling, pauses on hover via animationPlayState. Currently no executions exist so feed is empty. To test with data, start engine and inject test opportunities via /api/test/inject-arb-opportunity or /api/test/inject-crypto-market endpoints.
